---NPC---
NAME: Sera Voss
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Sharp cheekbones, iron-grey hair despite her age, always wears a long coat with too many pockets. Missing two fingers on her left hand — never explains how.
LOCATION: Crimson Alley, Markets Infinite (operates from a rented storage room behind a spice merchant)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Brokers relic acquisitions, manages field teams, occasionally handles "disappearance" contracts personally.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Mira Kessan
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Independent (twin to Kessan — both operate as info brokers)
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Never the same outfit twice. Moves through crowds like water. Her twin Kessan handles the storefront — Mira handles everything that doesn't have a front.
LOCATION: Grand Forum (visible); everywhere else (actual)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Buys and sells intelligence. Maintains a network of low-level informants across all six districts. Occasionally brokers introductions between parties who would never meet otherwise.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Injured. | [2026-04-10] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Brother Aldric
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult (The Returned)
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Tall, lean to the point of wrong. Wears the cult's grey wrappings. Reality scarring on his forearms looks like frozen ripples in water. Eyes are slightly too still.
LOCATION: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House inner chambers — handles recruitment and doctrinal interpretation
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Handles recruitment in the Warrens. Interprets Thane's teachings to new members. Disciplines those who waver. Occasionally interfaces with outside factions when Thane won't.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] A smuggled Rift shard fused with their palm, causing visions of the Tower Author...
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Pol Greaves
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Patchwork Saints
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Old for a fighter — moves like he earned every scar. Short, wide, armour that has been repaired so many times the original material is maybe 30% of what's there. Laughs loudly at bad situations.
LOCATION: The Warrens, Scrapworks adjacent (coordinates with Mara the Scrapper on resource sharing)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Coordinates Saints patrol routes, negotiates resource sharing with Mara, handles conflict resolution between Warrens residents. De facto liaison between Saints and outside factions.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Calix Drenn
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority / FTA
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: FTA uniform kept immaculate. Young for the rank. Moves with the specific energy of someone who believes very hard in the rules and hasn't yet had the rules fail them in a way they couldn't explain away.
LOCATION: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office (Director Myra Kess operates from the Tower proper — Calix is the street presence)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Issues and revokes adventurer licenses, conducts compliance spot-checks, investigates unlicensed Rift activity, files reports to Director Kess.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Vesper
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Formal at all times. Dark robes with contract sigils embroidered at the cuffs. Speaks in complete sentences with no filler words. Eyes are gold — unusual even for a Tiefling.
LOCATION: Pantheon Walk, Sanctum Quarter (maintains a private consultation office)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Drafts, witnesses, and mediates divine contracts. Advises petitioners on terms. Occasionally represents the Choir in external negotiations.
---END NPC---

RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Zephyrus is a tall, graceful Aasimar woman with silver-white hair that moves as if stirred by an unfelt breeze. She wears the Warden uniform with a windswept grey cloak that never seems to settle.

MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: As a Sergeant and cleric of Aeloria, Zephyrus leads patrols to secure the city's perimeter. She provides spiritual counsel to her squad and uses her divine magic to calm unstable Rift energies. Known for blessing new recruits with Aeloria's winds.

LOCATION: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter — transferred to Guild of Ashen Scrolls, studies ancient texts
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Leads a squad of Wardens, ensuring the safety of the Undercity's citizens and maintaining order within the city.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Cassius Argent-Heart
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Cassius is a tall, muscular man with silver hair that's starting to gray, and piercing green eyes. He carries himself with a quiet dignity, his armor always polished and well-maintained.
LOCATION: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls command room — leads combat teams, seeks redemption
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Cassius leads a team of Blades in patrols and combat against the threats from the Rifts.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Thoren Azurescale
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Thoren is a tall, broad-shouldered Dragonborn with deep-blue scales that shimmer iridescently under the Dome's light. His eyes are an intense violet, piercing yet filled with a melancholy that hints at hidden depths.
LOCATION: Guild Spires, Adventurers Guild Hall lower level — F-Rank, seeks recognition (secretly Thane's Cult)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Thoren takes on odd jobs and missions assigned by the Guild, often working alongside other F-Rank adventurers.
---END NPC---

---NPC---

RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: A tall, gaunt man with piercing blue eyes and a long, greasy beard that he constantly fiddles with. His tattered robes are adorned with cryptic symbols.

MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Edwyn serves as a scribe and archivist, cataloging the cult's history and rituals.

MOTIVATION:

---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Yaulderna Silverstreak
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wizards Tower
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Tall and sharp-featured with a streak of pure silver running through otherwise dark hair — the mark that gave her the name. Carries herself with the effortless authority of someone who hasn't needed to prove anything in decades. Wears layered robes of deep blue and grey, practical rather than ceremonial. Her hands glow faintly when she's thinking hard, which is most of the time.
LOCATION: Wizards Tower, upper floors (rarely seen below the third landing unless something has gone very wrong)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Oversees all Wizards Tower operations — research programs, student admissions, arcane licensing, and the Tower's relationship with other Undercity factions. Final authority on what magic the Tower will and will not sanction. Personally mentors a small number of advanced students.
HISTORY: [2026-04-11] Injured. | [2026-04-11] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Kyrus stands tall with his crimson scales glistening under the Dome's dim light. A scar running down his left cheek, a remnant from a past battle, adds an air of mystery to his imposing figure.
LOCATION: Markets Infinite, Consortium Underhalls — negotiates deals, secret Saints member
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: He spends his days negotiating deals with various adventurers, procuring valuable artifacts, and enforcing the Consortium's rules within the Undercity.

---NPC---
NAME: Captain Havel Korin
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wardens of Ash
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: A weathered man with grey-streaked hair cropped short and eyes that have seen too much. His face bears old scars he never explains, and he moves with the careful economy of someone who learned long ago to conserve their strength. Wears his Warden captain's insignia without ceremony. His hands are calloused from decades of work, and he keeps a simple iron ring on his left hand — its significance known only to him.
LOCATION: Outer Wall, Captain's Command — the fortified garrison overlooking the boundary between city and chaos
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Commands the Outer Wall garrison of the Wardens of Ash. Coordinates Rift response, manages patrol rotations, and personally mentors new Wardens and young adventurers who show promise. Known for his gruff but genuine care for those under his command. Works closely with the Adventurers Guild on joint operations.
---END NPC---

STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Devoted
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: A towering orc with battle-scarred skin and a thick, gray beard. He wears a simple robe with intricate, silver tattoos that seem to dance on his skin.
LOCATION: The Outer Caverns, Brother Thane's Sanctum
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Leads recruitment efforts and acts as a mediator between Brother Thane and the cult's rank-and-file members.

---NPC---
NAME: Serrik Dhal
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Gaunt where he was once solid, with the hollow look of a man whose body is failing faster than his mind. Iron-grey hair cropped short, military style. Wears simple, expensive clothes — no jewelry, no ornamentation. His hands shake slightly when he's tired, which is often now. Eyes remain sharp and calculating even as the rest of him fades.
LOCATION: Consortium Underhalls, Markets Infinite — rarely leaves his private offices anymore
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Final authority on all Consortium operations. Sets strategic direction, approves major acquisitions, manages relationships with other faction leaders. Increasingly delegates day-to-day operations to trusted lieutenants while focusing on the question of what comes after.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Lady Cerys Valemont
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Tall, athletic build maintained through daily training. Brown hair shot through with grey, worn short and practical. Face carries the weathered look of someone who has spent years in the field. Dresses in functional armor even in administrative settings — the Blades' silver insignia is the only decoration she permits herself.
LOCATION: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls command level — accessible to her people but maintains formal distance
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Commands all Argent Blades operations. Sets contracts, approves missions, disciplines members who violate the code. Represents the Blades in negotiations with other factions. Training and promotion of Senior Blades falls directly under her authority.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: High Apostle Yzura
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Striking even by Tiefling standards — solid gold eyes with no visible iris or pupil, horns that curve back elegantly, skin the deep red of old wine. Moves with deliberate grace. Dresses in layered black and gold robes covered in contract sigils so fine they look like embroidery. Her voice is always calm, even when delivering threats.
LOCATION: Sanctum Quarter, Choir Sanctum — the heart of divine contract work in the Undercity
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Final authority on Choir doctrine and approved divine contracts. Personally reviews any contract involving significant sacrifice or permanent commitment. Manages relationships with the various gods and entities the Choir brokers for. Trains senior Contract Mediators.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: The Widow
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Obsidian Lotus
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: The Widow is seen rarely and described inconsistently. Most accounts agree on: tall, slender, dressed in dark colors, face always partially obscured by shadow or veil. Some say pale skin; others remember dark. The voice is consistent — low, calm, with perfect diction. Those who have met her struggle to recall specific details afterward, as if the memory itself has been edited.
LOCATION: The Widow's Web, Eastern Warrens — a location that moves and changes, accessible only by invitation
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Absolute authority over the Obsidian Lotus. Approves all high-value contracts personally. Maintains the network of Ghosts and Specialists who carry out the Lotus's work. No one joins the inner circle without her direct selection.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Senior Archivist Pell
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Small even for a gnome, with wild white hair that defies any attempt at grooming and spectacles so thick they make his eyes look enormous. Constantly surrounded by floating notes, reference cards, and half-finished calculations. Dresses in academic robes covered in ink stains and margin annotations written directly on the fabric.
LOCATION: Archive Row, Grand Archive Dome — specifically the upper reading room he's claimed as his office
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Directs all Glass Sigil research and prophecy work. Maintains the master index of predictive patterns. Personally oversees the Thesaurus — the Sigil's semi-sentient archive system. Trains Senior Archivists in pattern recognition.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Mari Fen
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Athletic build maintained despite years behind a desk. Brown hair going grey at the temples, worn in a practical braid. Face carries laugh lines and old scars in equal measure. Dresses in well-worn adventuring leathers even during administrative work — she says it reminds her what the job is actually about.
LOCATION: Guild Spires, Adventurers Guild Hall — maintains an open-door policy that her staff finds exhausting
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Manages all Guild operations — rankings, contracts, training programs, death benefits. Personally interviews every adventurer who makes B-Rank. Maintains relationships with factions who hire adventurers. Keeps the memorial wall updated.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Injured. | [2026-04-10] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Brother Thane
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult (The Returned)
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Gaunt, almost skeletal, with skin that has a faint luminescent quality in dim light. Eyes are pale grey, almost white, and seem to look through rather than at people. Wears simple grey wrappings in the style his followers have adopted. Moves slowly and deliberately, as if moving through water. His voice is soft but carries in ways it shouldn't.
LOCATION: Collapsed Plaza, the Cult House depths — the heart of the Returned's territory
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Spiritual leader and final authority of the Returned. Interprets doctrine, accepts new members, guides the faithful toward 'readiness' for eventual Rift passage. Occasionally speaks prophecies that prove unsettlingly accurate. Rarely leaves the Cult House anymore.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Injured. | [2026-04-10] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Yuna Saltis
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Obsidian Lotus
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Quiet in a way that feels engineered. Pale lavender skin, dark eyes with no visible iris differentiation. Wears gloves always — claims it's professional habit. Very short.
LOCATION: The Warrens, Obsidian Lotus secondary location (not the main house — she operates from a private room in the Night Pits)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Performs high-value memory erasure contracts. Advises The Widow on complex cases. Occasionally consults on memory reconstruction (harder, less reliable, more expensive).
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Kaelen Duskbane
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Silver-streaked black hair hangs in a messy ponytail, with amber eyes that flicker like dying embers. A thin scar runs from temple to jaw, and they carry themselves with gruff weariness, always checking their back for threats.
LOCATION: Gutterbone District, Black Market Pawnshop
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Sells stolen gear and takes low-paying jobs guarding warehouses, using their knowledge of Undercity tunnels to smuggle contraband for richer Guild members.

---NPC---
NAME: Kargath Stoneclaw
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: A jagged scar runs from his left eyebrow to his jawline, darkening the matted rust-red fur around his neck. His tusks are filed down to sharp points, and his eyes glow faintly amber in the dim light of the Black Market.
LOCATION: Hollow Spine District, Black Market Undercroft
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Smuggles stolen artifacts and sells forbidden knowledge to the highest bidder, using his Guild credentials to bypass security checkpoints.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Vexar Scalefoot
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wizards Tower
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Small, with a wiry frame and mottled green-brown scales that shimmer like wet bark. His tail twitches nervously, betraying his anxiety, and his eyes are sharp, almost too intense for a Kobold.
LOCATION: Lower Archives, Arcane Archives District
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Catalogs forbidden tomes and experiments with unstable magical phenomena in the Tower's restricted archives.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Tessaly Orin
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Guild of Ashen Scrolls
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Ink-stained hands permanently. Wears reading lenses on a chain. Tends to mutter while working. Hair in a permanent state of being-just-put-up-or-just-taken-down.
LOCATION: Grand Forum Library, lower stacks (she has effectively colonised a section of the archive for her personal research project)
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Documents adventurer career trajectories, maintains the fate archive index, assists Eir Velan with Thesaurus communication protocols.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Veyra Emberveil
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Her ash-gray skin glows faintly with molten bronze veins, and her smoke-colored hair is braided with charred bone. She wears a patched leather apron stained with soot and arcane sigils, moving with the rigid precision of a soldier but the weary slouch of someone who’s seen too many graves.
LOCATION: Smoldering Quarter, Ashen Foundry sub-district
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Forges counterfeit relics and smuggles cult artifacts through the black market, using her elemental fire to melt down stolen metal into fake holy icons.
---END NPC---

LOCATION: Gutterpunk Quarter, Iron Spine alleyways
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Smuggles forbidden relics and corrupted scrolls through the Guild's underbelly, trading with black-market dealers in the Gutterpunk Quarter.

LOCATION: Arcane Warrens, Obsidian Archives
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Catalogs magical phenomena and experiments with rift energy, often working late in the archives with unstable containment chambers.

LOCATION: Ashen Quarter, Black Market Bazaar

---NPC---
NAME: Director Myra Kess
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority / FTA
RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown
APPEARANCE: Sharp features, close-cropped dark hair, always in formal FTA uniform. Moves with efficient precision. Her expression rarely changes — she's mastered the administrator's neutral face that reveals nothing. Small reading glasses she only wears in private. Hands show calluses from weapons training she still maintains.
LOCATION: The Tower proper, upper administrative levels — the official seat of FTA power
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Final authority on all FTA operations — licensing, compliance, Rift response coordination, inter-faction mediation. Commands the FTA's limited enforcement resources. Manages the political relationships that keep the Undercity from tearing itself apart.
---END NPC---

---NPC---

RANK: Member
SPECIES: Human
AGE: unknown

LOCATION: Ironworks District, Lower Forge
MOTIVATION: 
ROLE: Scouts for the Argent Blades, gathering intel on rival factions and unmarked tombs while secretly documenting cracks in the Dome's barriers.

---NPC---
NAME: Kaelan Veyth
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Acquisition Agent
SPECIES: Dragonborn
AGE: 34
APPEARANCE: Obsidian-scaled arms scarred with faint glowing runes, amber eyes that flicker like dying embers. Drapes a frayed cloak over a body built for hauling stolen goods, shoulders hunched from years of bending to smugglers' demands.
LOCATION: Smoldering Wards, Iron Maw scrap yard
MOTIVATION: Seeks a shattered relic called the Emberheart to protect their younger sister from Tower Authority hunters, but fears the artifact's corrupting power might destroy everything they care about.
ROLE: Sifts through black-market deals and corpse-laden cargo holds to extract valuable relics, negotiating with smugglers while evading both rival factions and the Consortium's own enforcers.
SECRET: The Emberheart is not a relic but a sentient shard of a fallen god, which has been whispering promises of power to Kaelan since they were a child—promises they've started to believe.
RELATIONSHIPS: Maintains a fragile alliance with smuggler Jorin 'the Maw's Mouth' despite suspecting he's using them to funnel goods to the Wardens of Ash. Secretly mourns the brother the Consortium executed for refusing to deliver a soul-harvesting artifact.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a storm of conflicting loyalties brewing—a dragonborn bound to a relic that remembers its own murder, with a sister's fate hanging on a choice between salvation and damnation.
HISTORY: [2026-04-09] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Klikk Scrapweaver
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Guild of Ashen Scrolls
RANK: Initiate
SPECIES: Goblin
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Scarred knuckles from ink-stained fingers and a patchwork cloak stitched from torn spellscrolls, eyes gleam with a permanent film of soot from handling ancient texts.
LOCATION: Ashen Quarter, Forged-Steel Workshop
MOTIVATION: Wants to prove goblins can be more than scavengers by mastering forbidden knowledge, but fears their past as a cult assassin will ruin their future.
ROLE: Transcribes cursed scrolls into usable formulas while secretly testing their stability in the workshop's subterranean vaults.
SECRET: Once a blade-singer for Brother Thane's Cult, Klikk smuggled ritual texts to the Guild to atone for slaughtering scribes during the Purge, but the scrolls now whisper of a hidden Tower chamber.
RELATIONSHIPS: Mentored by a disillusioned archivist who knows their past, but secretly spied on by a rival initiate from the Serpent Choir seeking the same forbidden knowledge.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a lingering curse from Thane's rituals binding Klikk's soul to the Tower's foundations, threatening to unravel both the Guild and the Dome itself.
HISTORY: [2026-04-09] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Veyra Duskhollow
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Independent
RANK: Respected Freelance
SPECIES: Elf
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Her silver hair is streaked with ash, and her eyes glow faintly amber. She moves with the weary grace of one who has seen too much, her posture rigidly upright despite the weight of secrets.
LOCATION: Docks, Iron Maw
MOTIVATION: She seeks a lost artifact that can undo a past betrayal, hoping to atone for the lives she’s taken. Her true goal is to break free from the cycle of vengeance that has bound her for decades.
ROLE: She brokers black-market deals in the Docks, using her knowledge of the Undercity’s underbelly to navigate its dangers.
SECRET: She is secretly the last surviving bloodline of the Duskhollow elves, a clan wiped out by the Iron Fang Consortium’s experiments.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a fragile truce with the Guild of Ashen Scrolls, who know her true heritage but demand her silence in exchange for protection.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a lingering curse from her clan’s experiments, a shadow that could either save or destroy the Undercity if unleashed.

---NPC---
NAME: Elias Vorne
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wizards Tower
RANK: Apprentice
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Gaunt face etched with ink-stained hands, his threadbare robe fraying at the cuffs. He carries himself with the brittle arrogance of someone who’s spent too many nights hunched over forbidden texts.
LOCATION: Arcanum District, LowerScript Archive
MOTIVATION: Elias craves validation from the senior magi, but his true drive is to unlock a forgotten spell that could save his sister’s life—no matter the cost.
ROLE: Transcribes ancient incantations and tends to the Tower’s volatile spell archives, often working late into the smog-choked nights.
SECRET: He’s not an apprentice—he’s a former adventurer exiled for using black-market magic, and the Tower’s archives hide his past crimes.
RELATIONSHIPS: Mentored by Archivist Mira Solen, but secretly spied on by the Adventurers Guild, who suspect his true loyalties.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a storm of unspent power in his veins, a reckoning tied to the sister he abandoned years ago.

---NPC---
NAME: Seraphine Duskveil
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wardens of Ash
RANK: Sergeant
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: 34
APPEARANCE: Her left eye glows with a faint, sickly gold hue, veins of starlight tracing her temples like faded tattoos. She wears a patched charcoal cloak stained with ash and burns a constant cigarette between her fingers, though the smoke dissipates into nothingness.
LOCATION: Ashen Quarter, Smoldering Stairwell
MOTIVATION: She wants to atone for the rift that consumed her sister years ago, but fears her own celestial blood might make her a target for the gods harvesting souls. She secretly believes the Wardens are complicit in the city's decay.
ROLE: Monitors rift activity in the Smoldering Stairwell, leading patrols to seal unstable tears in reality, and interrogates captured adventurers for intel.
SECRET: Seraphine is actually the daughter of a fallen god, her celestial heritage a curse that makes her a prime candidate for soul-harvesting. She faked her parents' deaths to escape their divine obligations.
RELATIONSHIPS: She secretly communicates with a defector from the Adventurers Guild who supplies her with forbidden knowledge. The Tower Authority views her as a liability and has tried to reassign her twice.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a lingering corruption in her divine bloodline and a desperate hope that her sister's soul might still be trapped in a rift somewhere.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

RANK: Blade

AGE: 40s

ROLE: 
SECRET: His past identity as a feared enforcer for the Argent Blades is unknown to his fellow Blades.
RELATIONSHIPS: Maintains a strained but necessary alliance with the Iron Fang Consortium, who are unaware of his double-agency.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep conflict within Alaric, a man who fights for justice while carrying the weight of his own transgressions. Returned from death as Specter. Changed. Dangerous. The Oracle watches with great interest.

---NPC---
NAME: Grover Ironfoot
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Acquisition Agent
SPECIES: Ghost (formerly Halfling)
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Grover stands at an imposing height for a halfling, his sturdy frame adorned with a leather jacket and a patchwork of Iron Fang emblems. A scar runs down his left cheek, a battle scar earned during a particularly dangerous acquisition.
MOTIVATION: Unfinished business from before death. Driven by hunger for what they lost.
ROLE: 
SECRET: Unbeknownst to the Iron Fang Consortium, Grover is secretly working with the Wardens of Ash to gather intelligence on the Consortium's operations, hoping to betray them and take control of the city's black market.
RELATIONSHIPS: Grover maintains a tense alliance with Zippy Quickclaw, the leader of the Patchwork Saints, who owes Grover a significant debt.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a hidden ambition and a heart heavy with loss within Grover Ironfoot, a man poised on the precipice of power. Returned from death as Ghost. Changed. Dangerous. The Oracle watches with great interest.

---NPC---
NAME: Kaelen Veyth
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Contract Scribe
SPECIES: Dragonborn
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Scaly obsidian skin with faint golden patterns resembling coiled serpents, a scar running from cheek to chin. Their fingers are perpetually stained with ink, and they carry themselves with a hunched posture, as if bracing for a blow.
LOCATION: Guttervein District, Undercroft Archive
MOTIVATION: Kaelen wants to protect their younger sister from the Choir’s dangerous contracts, but fears their own complicity in the organization’s crimes. They secretly hope to redeem their past by exposing the Choir’s corruption.
ROLE: Drafts and verifies contracts for the Serpent Choir, ensuring they’re legally sound while subtly altering terms to shield their sister from the organization’s risks.
RELATIONSHIPS: Close to their sister, who works as a smuggler in the Black Market, and has a tense, veiled rivalry with the Choir’s enforcer, Thrain Ironwound.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a lingering connection to the Guild of Ashen Scrolls and a hidden power tied to their dragonblood heritage, which could either save or destroy the Choir’s secrets.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Introduced to the Undercity roster.

---NPC---
NAME: Kaelen Duskhorn
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: Unranked
SPECIES: Kobold
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Kaelen has a tail that curls tightly around his wrist, a habit from years of gripping weapons. His eyes are a sharp amber, always scanning for threats, and his skin bears faint scars from failed exorcisms.
LOCATION: Guttervein, Iron Needle Tavern
MOTIVATION: Kaelen seeks to escape the Guild's disdain for kobolds by earning respect through covert ops, but his true goal is to find a cure for his brother's cursed soul, stolen by the gods.
ROLE: Kaelen scouts forgotten tunnels and trades in rare artifacts, using his knowledge of the Undercity's secrets to survive.
SECRET: He is secretly a former exorcist who betrayed the Serpent Choir to save his brother, now hunted by both the Choir and the gods for his heresy.
RELATIONSHIPS: Kaelen maintains a fragile alliance with a human smuggler who provides him with forbidden relics, but the smuggler suspects his true allegiance.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle sees Kaelen's soul as a fractured mirror, reflecting the cost of defying divine and mortal powers alike.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Ignacia Vitreous
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Junior Archivist
SPECIES: Tiefling
AGE: 34
APPEARANCE: Her crimson horns are etched with faint glass patterns, and her tail ends in a cracked, gemstone-like tip. She wears a soot-stained leather apron over a tunic stained with ink and old blood, moving with the slow precision of someone who’s spent years hunched over brittle tomes.
LOCATION: Shattered Archives, Hollow Spire District
MOTIVATION: She wants to prove the Glass Sigil’s records are untampered, but secretly fears the archives hold evidence of her past as an adventurer who stole a cursed relic. She’s desperate to erase that mistake before it destroys her again.
ROLE: She catalogs forbidden texts and decrypts old case files, carefully erasing traces of her own reckless history while hunting for a way to undo the curse she accidentally bound to herself.
SECRET: The relic she stole—a shard of the Tower’s original seal—is embedded in her spine, its magic slowly corrupting her body. Every time she touches a restricted archive, the curse grows stronger.
RELATIONSHIPS: She’s tolerated by her mentor, Archivist Moris Vey, who suspects her odd behavior but never asks questions. The Guild of Ashen Scrolls quietly tracks her, hoping to reclaim the relic she stole.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a storm of fractured truths—her body is a prison for a power that could shatter the Dome, but her soul is already broken by the weight of what she’s hidden.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Elara Veyne
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wizards Tower
RANK: Journeyman
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Her charcoal-gray cloak is frayed at the hem from hauling crates, and her left eye bears a faint scar from a failed alchemy experiment. She carries herself with the hunched posture of someone who’s spent years hunched over smoldering sigils.
LOCATION: Gilded Hollow, Arcane Bazaar
MOTIVATION: She wants to prove she’s more than her family’s disgrace—a line of failed enchanters who died in the Tower’s early days. She secretly hopes to redeem her name by mastering the forbidden art of soul-binding.
ROLE: She sorts through magical artifacts in the Tower’s vaults by day and runs a shadow trade in unstable reagents by night.
SECRET: Elara is actually the daughter of the first Archmage who vanished during the Tower’s founding, and she’s been hiding her bloodline to avoid being hunted by the Tower’s own enforcers.
RELATIONSHIPS: Her mentor, Magister Caelum, knows her secret but keeps it buried out of fear of rebellion. She’s also secretly in debt to a smuggler who wants her to steal a cursed relic from the Serpent Choir.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a flicker of ancient magic in her veins and a reckoning tied to the Tower’s original sin—a sacrifice she’s prepared to repeat.
HISTORY: [2026-04-10] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Pip Wrenthorn
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Follower
SPECIES: Halfling
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Wiry frame with pale, ink-stained fingers and a jagged scar running from his temple to his jaw. Wears a patchwork coat stitched from scavenged leather, its collar folded over a scarred collarbone.
LOCATION: Docks of Black Maw, The Hollow Gauge
MOTIVATION: Wants to save his sister from being used as a sacrifice, but fears the Cult will kill her if he tries to flee. Believes Brother Thane’s rituals can resurrect the dead, and he’s desperate to bring back his mother, lost to a rift.
ROLE: Smuggles forbidden relics between the Docks and the Cult’s sanctum, bribing guards with stolen arcane components.
SECRET: He is the halfling who accidentally tore a rift in the Undercity’s foundation years ago, drawing the Cult’s attention to his family. His sister is the only one who knows the true location of the rift’s epicenter.
RELATIONSHIPS: Spied on by the Glass Sigil, who suspect his smuggling routes fund Cult activities. Has a tense alliance with a Warden of Ash who once saved his sister from a rogue adventurer.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a flicker of unstable power in his palms—echoes of the rift he unleashed, still trying to bind itself to his mortal form.
HISTORY: [2026-04-11] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Grom Vulgarn
STATUS: injured
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Senior Blade
SPECIES: Half-Orc
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Grom stands tall with scarred muscles and a crooked nose, his eyes often hidden behind dark sunglasses. He carries a long sword and a pair of brass knuckles, ready for any fight.
MOTIVATION: Grom seeks to prove his worth to the Argent Blades, driven by a fierce determination to atone for his past mistakes.
ROLE: 
SECRET: "In the Undercity, the shadow of the Lich King has granted me an unnatural second life, but at a cost - I now bear a fragment of his icy essence within me, causing strange, frozen auras to emanate from my being."
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a tense truce with the Wardens of Ash due to their shared interest in keeping the city safe.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep-seated turmoil within Grom, a struggle between loyalty and ambition. Recently resurrected — disoriented, weakened, and carrying the weight of what they saw on the other side.
HISTORY: [2026-03-12] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-19] Returned from death. Changed. | [2026-04-03] Injured. | [2026-04-03] Succumbed to injuries. Faction: Argent Blades, Rank: Senior Blade. | [2026-04-11] RESURRECTED via Tower Fund Me campaign. Weakened but alive.
---END NPC---
